positive: A whimsical and detailed symmetrical design featuring a stylized forest scene with glowing bioluminescent flora and fauna. The central element is a graceful, stylized stag silhouette framed by overgrown vines and fantastical, highly detailed leaves. The color palette should be deep indigo and emerald green, accented by pops of ethereal cyan and gold light sources. The style is a blend of Art Nouveau illustration and modern tattoo flash, optimized for high contrast and clean separation for textile printing. Composition must be perfectly centered, with clear, graphic lines and bold silhouettes against a slightly textured, forest-mist background. High resolution, vector graphic aesthetic, clean edges, intricate detail.
